title: Two in a Crowd
writer: Lewis R. Foster, Doris Malloy, Earle Snell
actors: Joan Bennett, Joel McCrea, Henry Armetta
plot: When two halves of a thousand-dollar bill are discovered in the snow, the penniless pair that individually grabs each half must come to terms. Actress Julia Wayne needs the whole $1,000, and so does sportsman Larry Stevens. Since ...
